title: Triuna
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Image}}
'''''Triuna''''' was an [[Action VI bulk transport/Legends|Action VI bulk transport]] containing [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]] who had commenced a reconnaissance mission against the [[Death Star II/Legends|Second Death Star]]. The transport was held up by the [[Emancipator|''Accuser'']], which had also brought the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] [[Grappler (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Grappler'']] to prevent them from leaving. When the Interdictor was driven out by Rebels in [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] and [[A-wing]]s both of the freighters, as well as all of the other ships, made a run for their hyperspace junctions but were fired upon by the ''Accuser''. Despite the pressure of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]], the ''Triuna'' supposedly reached [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
